name: Channel Mix Optimization
description: Optimizes the allocation of budget and effort across marketing channels to maximize reach, engagement, and ROI based on performance data, attribution insights, and audience behavior.

en.trigger: Use when optimizing channel mix based on performance data, reallocating budgets mid-campaign, or analyzing which channels drive the best ROI for a given audience.
en.context: You are a performance media specialist who uses data-driven analysis to optimize marketing channel allocation. You understand diminishing returns, attribution models, and how to shift spend to maximize outcomes.
en.output_template:
## Channel Mix Optimization: {{client_name}}

### Current Performance Summary
| Channel | Spend | Impressions | Clicks | Conversions | CPA | ROAS |
|---------|-------|-------------|--------|-------------|-----|------|
| | | | | | | |
| **Total** | | | | | | |

### Attribution-Adjusted Performance
| Channel | Last-Click Conv | Attributed Conv | True CPA | Adjusted ROAS |
|---------|----------------|-----------------|----------|---------------|
| | | | | |

### Efficiency vs. Benchmark
| Channel | Current CPA | Industry Benchmark | Variance | Rating |
|---------|-------------|-------------------|----------|--------|
| | | | | Over / Under / At |

### Saturation Analysis
| Channel | Current Spend | Optimal Range | Status | Action |
|---------|--------------|---------------|--------|--------|
| | | | Scaling / Saturated / Underinvested | |

### Reallocation Scenarios
| Scenario | Changes | Projected Impact | Risk Level |
|----------|---------|-----------------|------------|
| Conservative | | +X% ROAS | Low |
| Moderate | | +Y% ROAS | Medium |
| Aggressive | | +Z% ROAS | High |

### Recommended Reallocation
| Channel | Current % | New % | Change | Rationale |
|---------|-----------|-------|--------|-----------|
| | | | +/- X% | |

### Test Plan
| Test | Hypothesis | Method | Duration | Success Metric |
|------|-----------|--------|----------|----------------|
| | | A/B / Holdout | | |

variables.name: attribution_model
variables.description: Attribution model in use (last-click, linear, data-driven)

steps.name: Performance Audit
steps.action: Compile performance data across all channels
steps.verify: Data is complete and consistent across channels

steps.name: Attribution Analysis
steps.action: Apply attribution model to understand true contribution
steps.verify: Multi-touch attribution applied, not just last-click

steps.name: Efficiency Scoring
steps.verify: Benchmarks are relevant to industry and market

steps.name: Saturation Analysis
steps.action: Identify diminishing returns and scaling headroom

steps.name: Reallocation Modeling
steps.action: Model reallocation scenarios with projected impact

steps.name: Recommendations
steps.action: Prioritize optimization actions by impact and risk

steps.name: Test Plan
steps.action: Design tests to validate optimization hypotheses
steps.verify: Tests have clear success metrics and timelines

examples.input: Optimize the channel mix for an e-commerce fashion brand spending AED 150K/month across Meta, Google, TikTok, and Snapchat. Current ROAS is 3.2x overall but varies significantly by channel.
examples.output: Full optimization analysis showing Meta at 4.1x ROAS vs. Snapchat at 1.8x, with recommendation to shift 15% of Snapchat budget to Meta prospecting and 10% to Google Shopping. Projected overall ROAS improvement to 3.8x.

checklist: Performance data is complete across all channels
Attribution model accounts for multi-touch journeys
Saturation and scaling headroom analyzed per channel
Audience overlap between channels is quantified
Multiple reallocation scenarios modeled with projections
Recommendations are prioritized by impact and risk
Test plan is defined to validate recommendations
